creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
On Tue, 6 May 2008 08:03:34 GMT, itetcu wrote

> Doesn't build on 5 and 6 (both i386 and amd64):

It seems that the update of md5.h has broken the build on those platforms (gcc
3.x). Here is an additional patch (to apply after the first one) that reverts
the update of md5.h and will allow us to wait for an 'official' fix from the
main developer.

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
http://www.martymac.com
